## Confections namespace

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[ConfectionsLibrary](./ts-chocolate.confections.confectionslibrary.md)


</td><td>

Multi-source confection library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "user.dark-dome-bonbon") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[canScaleByFrames(confection)](./ts-chocolate.confections.canscalebyframes.md)


</td><td>

Type guard to check if a confection is a molded bonbon for frame-based scaling


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isBarTruffle(confection)](./ts-chocolate.confections.isbartruffle.md)


</td><td>

Type guard for IBarTruffle


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isMoldedBonBon(confection)](./ts-chocolate.confections.ismoldedbonbon.md)


</td><td>

Type guard for IMoldedBonBon


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[isRolledTruffle(confection)](./ts-chocolate.confections.isrolledtruffle.md)


</td><td>

Type guard for IRolledTruffle


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[scaleConfection(confection, factor, options)](./ts-chocolate.confections.scaleconfection.md)


</td><td>

Scales any confection, automatically choosing the appropriate method.

For molded bonbons, if frameCount and cavitiesPerMold are provided, uses frame-based scaling. Otherwise, uses linear scaling by factor.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[scaleConfectionByFactor(confection, factor, options)](./ts-chocolate.confections.scaleconfectionbyfactor.md)


</td><td>

Scales a confection by a factor.

This function applies a linear scale factor to the confection's yield.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[scaleConfectionToCount(confection, targetCount, options)](./ts-chocolate.confections.scaleconfectiontocount.md)


</td><td>

Scales a confection to a target count.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[scaleMoldedBonBonByFrames(confection, frameCount, cavitiesPerMold, options)](./ts-chocolate.confections.scalemoldedbonbonbyframes.md)


</td><td>

Scales a molded bonbon confection by number of frames/molds.

For molded bonbons, this calculates the yield based on the number of frames and the cavities per mold. Requires the confection to have a recommended mold with known cavity count.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
